title: Faithful 64x - Clear Glass
description: Remove annoying square lines on every glass block (including glass panel). Support connected textures.
body:
# Summary This resource pack only removes square lines from every glass block (including glass pane). That's all. **Required:** [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x).
**Optional:** [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (for connected textures), [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) (for config menu to enable **No Border**). # Pack Order **This pack**
Faithful 64x # Known Issue(s) ~~Enable **No Border** did not apply to some glass blocks.~~ Fixed in 2.1

**Credits:**
[Clearer Tinted Glass](https://faithfulpack.net/addons/ClearerTintedGlass) by [**Scutoel**](https://modrinth.com/user/Scutoel).
[CTM Converter](https://ewanhowell.com/tools/ctmconverter/) by [**Ewan Howell**](https://www.youtube.com/ewanhowell).
